/usr/bin/ar qc libvideo_sdk_core.a CMakeFiles/video_sdk_core.dir/core/src/Filter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/video_sdk_core.dir/core/src/Filters.cpp.o CMakeFiles/video_sdk_core.dir/core/src/FilterEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/video_sdk_core.dir/core/src/FrameBuffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/video_sdk_core.dir/core/src/FrameBufferPool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/video_sdk_core.dir/core/src/ShaderManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/video_sdk_core.dir/core/src/pipeline/PipelineGraph.cpp.o CMakeFiles/video_sdk_core.dir/core/src/ThreadCheck.cpp.o CMakeFiles/video_sdk_core.dir/core/src/GLContextManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/video_sdk_core.dir/core/src/timeline/Timeline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/video_sdk_core.dir/core/src/timeline/Track.cpp.o CMakeFiles/video_sdk_core.dir/core/src/timeline/Clip.cpp.o CMakeFiles/video_sdk_core.dir/core/src/timeline/Compositor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/video_sdk_core.dir/core/src/timeline/DecoderPool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/video_sdk_core.dir/core/src/timeline/AudioMixer.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libvideo_sdk_core.a
